title: lithospermum berlandieri
intro: Lithospermum berlandieri, also known as Gay's or Berlandier's lungwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the southern and central regions of Texas in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Lithospermum berlandieri include reducing inflammation, promoting expectoration, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. Lithospermum berlandieri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a variety of forms.
